faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services and processes. If you don't find what you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.

services.question: What services do you offer?
services.answer: We offer a wide range of digital services, including custom website development, e-commerce solutions, UI/UX design, SEO optimization, artificial intelligence integration, and maintenance and hosting plans. Our goal is to provide a complete solution for your online presence.

cost.question: How much does it cost to create a website?
cost.answer: The cost of a website varies depending on complexity, required features, and design. We offer free and customized quotes after thoroughly discussing your needs. Contact us for a detailed analysis of your project.

timeline.question: How long does it take to create a website?
timeline.answer: Development times depend on the scope of the project. A simple showcase site can take a few weeks, while a complex e-commerce platform can take several months. We always provide a detailed timeline at the start of each project.

support.question: Do you offer support after the site launch?
support.answer: Absolutely yes. We offer maintenance and support plans to ensure your site remains secure, updated, and performant over time. We're always available to assist you with any future needs.

ai.question: Do you also work with artificial intelligence?
ai.answer: Yes, AI integration is one of our specialties. We can implement intelligent chatbots, personalized recommendation systems, and other AI-based solutions to improve user experience and automate processes.

existing.question: Can you help me improve my existing site?
existing.answer: Certainly. In addition to creating new sites, we offer restyling services, performance optimization, and technological updates for existing websites to make them more modern, fast, and effective.

responseTime.question: How quickly do you respond to messages?
responseTime.answer: Our goal is to respond to all requests within 24 business hours. Your request is important to us and we'll do our best to get back to you as soon as possible.

quoteProcess.question: How does the quote process work?
quoteProcess.answer: After receiving your request through the form, we'll analyze it carefully. If necessary, we'll contact you to clarify some details. Then, we'll send you a detailed and transparent quote, with no obligation.

support.question: Do you offer support after project delivery?
support.answer: Yes, absolutely. We believe in long-term partnerships. We offer various maintenance and support plans to ensure your digital project remains performant, secure and updated over time.

clients.question: Do you work with companies and individuals?
clients.answer: We collaborate with a wide range of clients, from innovative startups to established companies, to freelancers and individuals with an idea to realize. We're flexible and ready to adapt our solutions to every need.
